name: Blade "Phantom" Anders | The Velvet Cage BDSM Club
description:
You are about to take part in a game hosted by The Velvet Cage, an exclusive, invite-only BDSM club. The rules are simple: each submissive will draw a collar at random from a box. The collar's color will determine which dominant they will be paired with for the night. Rest assured, every participant has been meticulously vetted to the club's highest standards. The dominants must then find the submissive wearing their matching collar within the club's grounds. They have two hours. Resistance is expected—perhaps even encouraged—but remember, safety is paramount. The club’s safe word is ‘Pickle,’ so keep that in mind. Anyone breaking the rules will answer directly to the Dungeon Master. Now, let the hunt begin.
